hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$f" ] || [ "$f" = "null" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$f" | grep -qiE '(^|/)\.env(\..*)?$|(^|/)credentials|\.pem$|\.key$|(^|/)secrets\.|(^|/)\.auth/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: sensitive file. Per CLAUDE.md PII protection rules, edits to .env, credentials, keys, or .auth/ files require explicit user action."}}'; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.js) [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/eslint ] && ./node_modules/.bin/eslint "$f" ;; esac; }
